occupation: Co-Chief Executive Officer at JCDecaux UK
headline: Co-Chief Executive Officer at JCDecaux UK
summary:
As Co-CEO of JCDecaux UK, the brand-first digital media company that is the market leader in Out-of-Home advertising across Airport, Rail, Retail and Roadside environments.

With all sectors of the UK business now digitally advanced, my goal is to grow Out-of-Home’s share, the Programmatic OOH (Out of Home) market and to ensure that JCDecaux UK’s delivery, digital products and data continue to provide a powerful platform for brand-building and activation for clients and agencies.
My values-led approach aka JCDecaux’s ‘Playbook,’ makes JCDecaux stand apart from the competition with a combined focus on serving our landlord, client, and media partners, while championing the ‘giving back’ ethos that underpins our business internally and externally. 

I champion a culture of wellbeing and inclusivity in the company, encouraging a supportive and inclusive culture where people feel able to do their best work. I strongly believe that collaboration starts at the top. 

Before my appointment as Co-CEO in April 2019, I  was previously Chief Commercial Officer and Commercial Director at JCDecaux UK.

In my early career, I worked for a family business in the manufacturing sector in South Africa. I'm also a Sports Marketing graduate from South Africa.

experiences.title: Co-Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
Dallas is Co-CEO of JCDecaux UK, the digital media company that is reshaping the future for Out-of-Home advertising across public screens in Airport, Rail, Retail and Roadside environments. He is also proud to be a Youth Group Ambassador.

Dallas is championing a new two-screen future for OOH, in which the public screen of OOH and the private screen of mobile drives effectiveness for brands. Leading the transformation of Out-of-Home towards a more automated and sustainable future, Dallas ensures that JCDecaux UK’s delivery, digital products and data continue to provide a powerful platform for brand communication for clients and agencies.
 
Before his appointment as Co-CEO in April 2019, Dallas was Chief Commercial Officer and Commercial Director at JCDecaux UK.  In his early career, Dallas worked for a family business in the manufacturing sector in South Africa. Dallas is a Sports Marketing graduate from the University of Port Elizabeth, South Africa.
